summary: Iteration 151: Forensic Truth Gate verification complete. All backend APIs (brain/priorities, integrations/merge/connected) correctly expose integrity_alerts, truth_summary, and canonical truth states (crm_state/accounting_state/email_state). No false zero-value phrases found in API responses. Frontend Advisor page loads successfully without false conflict cards, displays appropriate truth-gate messaging.

minor.issue: Slow response time (~15s) could contribute to Advisor loading delays

critical_code_review_comments: Truth gate working correctly: /api/brain/priorities returns 0 concerns and 7 integrity alerts when CRM/accounting truth is stale
Canonical truth states exposed: crm_state=stale, accounting_state=stale, email_state=unverified
No false zero-value phrases found in any API response (no 'average cycle of 0 days', 'operating expense pressure is running at 0%', etc.)
Advisor page shows appropriate message: 'Business Brain is currently unavailable. Priority decisions are paused until data feed recovers.'
Decision surface renders with 'Business State: Stable' and '0 open signals' - honest messaging instead of false claims

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Advisor page loads, no false conflict cards, no loading skeleton trap)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Truth gate is fully operational. When CRM/accounting sources are stale (>12h old), Business Brain returns 0 concerns and 7 integrity alerts. The Advisor page correctly shows fallback messaging instead of false zero-value claims. Outlook status endpoint is slow (~15s) but functional.

features_verified.brain_priorities_integrity_alerts: PASS - Returns 7 integrity alerts when sources are stale
features_verified.brain_priorities_truth_summary: PASS - Exposes connector_truth with crm/accounting/email states
features_verified.brain_priorities_no_false_zero_claims: PASS - No forbidden phrases like 'average cycle of 0 days' found
features_verified.advisor_page_loads: PASS - Not stuck in loading skeleton
features_verified.advisor_page_fallback_messaging: PASS - Shows 'Business Brain data is currently unavailable' with clear guidance
